name: Gingerbread Men
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a bowl, mix the flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda. Add the bran and spices; rub in the margarine until the mixture resembles fine breadcrumbs.
3. Stir the sweetener into the egg and orange juice. Beat it into the flour mixture. Knead well and roll out thinly on a floured board.
4. Cut into gingerbread men shapes (or other shapes) using a cutter, and place them on greased cookie sheets.
5. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until crisp and lightly browned. Cool on a wire rack and store in an airtight container.
